variants: Troy Dacres has carved a niche for himself in the literary world, with his works published by Velvet Beacon Books. A graduate of Pilgrim Gate University, he has coupled his academic background with a professional role at Firebranch Media, where he frequently employs the Germanic tongue in his projects. In addition to his professional pursuits, Troy is dedicated to his community as the Festival Sponsorship Lead Starbluff, where he collaborates with sponsors to enrich local festivities.
